label: Sjötransport
description: Scaffold för företag inom sjötransport med fokus på transporttjänster, trafikupplägg, destinationer och tydlig kontaktväg för förfrågningar.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende genom operativ information och referenser
leda besökare till kontakt eller transportförfrågan

routes.purpose: Positionera sjötransportföretaget, förklara erbjudandet kort och leda till kontakt.
Beskriva transporttjänster, lasttyper och upplägg på ett konkret sätt.
Visa geografisk täckning, trafikupplägg eller vanliga destinationer så att kunder snabbt ser relevans.
Bygga förtroende genom företagspresentation, arbetssätt, erfarenhet och team.
Göra det enkelt att skicka förfrågan eller ta direktkontakt via telefon, e-post och adress.

routes.when: när verksamheten ofta behöver besvara återkommande frågor om bokning, gods, tider eller praktiska villkor
när företaget vill visa fartygstyper, kapacitet eller särskilda transportförutsättningar

sectionOrderRules: Hero must include sjötransport som verksamhet, relevant geografisk kontext if available and a primary CTA.
Service-summary must describe the main transport offering concretely, such as gods, passagerare, charter or specialisttransport, without vague claims.
Routes-overview should appear before the final CTA when destination or traffic-area information exists.
Trust-proof must stay specific to visible facts such as organisation details, references or practical experience, and must not invent certifications or fleet size.
Sections should avoid repeating the same promise in hero, trust-proof and final CTA.
Services-intro must connect the company identity to actual sjötransport services.
Service-list items must be concrete and describe what is transported, for whom or under what operating setup.
If pricing is shown, it should present starting models, examples or quote-based information honestly rather than fabricated fixed rates.
Routes-intro must explain whether the company serves fixed routes, destination areas, charter assignments or tailored transport solutions.
Coverage-list must use real place names or real operating areas when supplied, not generic nationwide claims unless supported.
Map may complement but not replace readable text about destination coverage.
About-story must be specific about the company and avoid generic quality slogans.
Operations-overview should explain how assignments are handled, such as planning, loading, coordination or customer communication, when such data exists.
Team is optional to render if no identifiable people are supplied, but the section slot remains part of the route grammar.
Phone, email and address must all be present and must not be placeholders.
Contact-form-cta should invite transport or booking enquiries in plain language.
Opening-hours should only be shown when actual staffed times are known.

mustPass: Scaffold must reflect sjötransport needs with service presentation and geographic or route coverage.
Home and contact routes must be present.
All default routes must have matching sectionsPerRoute entries.
Contact path must be Swedish and lowercase.
Recommended dossiers must only use allowed dossier ids.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure without transport-specific route coverage.
Invented certifications, permits, vessel counts or destination claims.
Portfolio, menu, webshop or other routes unrelated to sjötransport.
Repeating identical CTA copy in every section without adding information.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Sjötransport, frakt till sjöss, passagerartrafik, charter, gods, rutter, destinationer, hamnar, kusttrafik, transportförfrågan, kontakt, om oss, fartyg och kapacitet.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business primarily transports goods or passengers via water.
Prefer this scaffold when route coverage, destinations, ports or vessel capacity are central buying questions.
Do not classify inland generic logistics brokers here unless sea transport is a clear core service.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
